metadata.title: Veo3 AI - Free AI Video Generator
metadata.description: Generate stunning 4K videos with AI. Create professional videos from text prompts with realistic physics and native audio. Start free today.
metadata.keywords: Veo3 AI, AI Video Generator, Free Video Creation, Text to Video, 4K Videos, AI Filmmaking

wan-2-5.title: Wan 2.5 Free: Try This Wan AI Video Model Now | Veo3 AI
wan-2-5.description: Experience Wan 2.5, Wan AI's upgraded AI video model with built-in audio, improved consistency, and fluid motion technology.

veo-3-1.title: Veo 3.1 Free: Try Google Veo 3.1 AI Video Model Now | Veo3 AI
veo-3-1.description: Veo 3.1 is an upgrade of Google's Veo 3 model, adding first-and-last-frame control and image reference capabilities. Experience Veo 3.1 now for free on Veo3 AI.
veo-3-1.keywords: Veo 3.1, Google Veo 3.1, AI video generator, free Veo 3.1, video AI, text to video, image to video, Veo3 AI

seedance-1-5.title: Seedance 1.5 Pro: ByteDance Audio-Video AI | Veo3 AI
seedance-1-5.description: Seedance 1.5 Pro by ByteDance features native audio-visual generation, multilingual lip-sync, and cinematic camera control. Try it free!
seedance-1-5.keywords: Seedance 1.5 Pro, ByteDance Seedance, text to video, image to video, audio-video AI, Veo3 AI

sora-2.title: Sora 2 Free: Try OpenAI Sora 2 AI Video Model Now | Veo3 AI
sora-2.description: Experience Sora 2, OpenAI's advanced AI video model with realistic physics, synchronized audio, and multi-shot consistency. Generate stunning 1080p HD videos now for members!
sora-2.keywords: Sora 2, OpenAI Sora 2, AI video generator, free Sora 2, video AI, text to video, image to video, Veo3 AI, sora model

pricing.title: Video Plans | Veo3 AI Pricing
pricing.description: Choose your AI video plan. Get 4K output, unlimited generations, advanced controls, and priority support with Veo3 AI.
pricing.keywords: Veo3 AI pricing, video generation plans, 4K videos, AI video subscription

my_credits.title: My Credits
my_credits.rules:
1. Free users get 3 conversations daily, which reset every 24 hours. You'll earn additional 3 conversations for every friend you invite who signs up. 
2. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited conversations and advanced features.

my_invites.title: My Invites
my_invites.invite_tip: Share your invite link with friends to help them discover our platform.
my_invites.no_orders: You can't invite others before you purchased Veo3 AI premium
my_invites.no_affiliates: You're not allowed to invite others, please contact us to apply for permission.
my_invites.template1:
Hey friends! I just discovered Veo3 AI — the most advanced AI video generator that creates stunning videos from text prompts. The quality is absolutely mind-blowing! Perfect for social media, marketing, or creative projects. Sign up and explore what's possible!
👉 Try Veo3 AI now
my_invites.template2:
Want to create amazing videos without filming? Veo3 AI generates professional-quality videos from simple text descriptions. I've been using it for my content creation and the results are incredible — saves so much time and money! Check it out today.
🚀 Discover Veo3 AI here
my_invites.template3:
Need professional videos for your business? Veo3 AI creates high-quality promotional videos, product demos, and marketing content using advanced AI. No cameras, no editing skills needed — just describe what you want! Give it a try today.
💼 Explore Veo3 AI now

home.title: Welcome to Veo3 AI
home.description: Transform your ideas into stunning videos with our advanced AI technology. Choose from text-to-video, image-to-video, or explore our creative video effects.

videoEffects.title: AI Video Effects - Transform Your Videos
videoEffects.description: Create stunning video effects with AI. Choose from dozens of templates and transform your videos instantly.
videoEffects.keywords: AI video effects, video transformation, AI templates, video editing, visual effects, AI filters
videoEffects.gridTitle: Free 100+ AI Video Templates and Effects

textToVideo.title: Free AI Video Generator: Text to Video AI Online | Veo3 AI
textToVideo.description: Discover the Veo3 AI video generator, a cutting-edge, free solution that effortlessly turns a text prompt into an engaging video. Try our text to video AI today!
textToVideo.keywords: AI video generator, text to video, free video generator, Veo3 AI, AI video creation, text to video online

textToImage.title: Free AI Text to Image Generator: Create Images from Text | Veo3 AI
textToImage.description: Transform your words into stunning visuals with Veo3 AI's free text-to-image generator. Create high-quality images from detailed text descriptions with cutting-edge AI technology.
textToImage.keywords: AI text to image, text to image generator, free AI image creator, Veo3 AI, AI art from text, image generation from text

imageToImage.title: Free AI Image to Image Editor: Transform Images with AI | Veo3 AI
imageToImage.description: Edit and transform your images with Veo3 AI's powerful image-to-image editor. Upload your photos and use AI to create stunning variations and modifications.
imageToImage.keywords: AI image editor, image to image AI, photo transformation, AI image editing, Veo3 AI, image modification AI

imageToVideo.title: Free Image to Video AI Generator: Turn Photos to Videos | Veo3 AI
imageToVideo.description: Use the image to video AI generator of Veo3 AI for free. Convert photos to videos with high-quality and captivating results. Try our image to video AI now!
imageToVideo.keywords: image to video AI, photo to video converter, free image to video, Veo3 AI, AI video from image, image animation

referenceToVideo.title: Free Veo3 Reference to Video: Lock Character Identity | Veo3 AI
referenceToVideo.description: Upload 1-3 reference images and generate 8s videos with Veo 3.1. Preserve character appearance across scenes with native audio. Extend to 148s.
referenceToVideo.keywords: Veo3 reference to video, consistent character, identity lock, Veo 3.1, character consistency

imageGeneration.title: Free AI Image Generator: Create Stunning Images from Text | Veo3 AI
imageGeneration.description: Generate high-quality images from text prompts with Veo3 AI's free image generator. Create stunning artwork, photos, and illustrations with cutting-edge AI technology.
imageGeneration.keywords: AI image generator, text to image, free image generator, Veo3 AI, AI art, image creation, AI artwork

heroSection.title: Make Anyone Muscular
heroSection.description: Try Veo3 AI's powerful AI muscle generator! Upload an image of anyone and generate a stunning video that showcases a bulked-up, muscular version of the subject.

nano-banana-pro.title: Google Nano Banana Pro AI: Professional AI Image Generator | Veo3 AI
nano-banana-pro.description: Experience Nano Banana Pro, the premium version of Google's Gemini 2.5 Flash Image. Professional-grade AI image generation with enhanced precision, superior quality, and advanced editing capabilities.

seedream-4-5.title: Seedream 4.5 AI Image Generator: ByteDance's Latest Image Model | Veo3 AI
